Name: UTextureRenderTarget2D
Description:
TextureRenderTarget2D
 
  2D render target texture resource. This can be used as a target
  for rendering as well as rendered as a regular 2D texture resource.

Variables.Name: ClearColor
Variables.Description: the color the texture is cleared to

Variables.Name: AddressX
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the X axis.

Variables.Name: AddressY
Variables.Description: The addressing mode to use for the Y axis.

Variables.Name: bForceLinearGamma
Variables.Description: True to force linear gamma space for this render target

Variables.Name: bHDR_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Whether to support storing HDR values, which requires more memory.

Variables.Name: RenderTargetFormat
Variables.Description:
Format of the texture render target. 
	  Data written to the render target will be quantized to this format, which can limit the range and precision.
	  The largest format (RTF_RGBA32f) uses 16x more memory and bandwidth than the smallest (RTF_R8) and can greatly affect performance.  
	  Use the smallest format that has enough precision and range for what you are doing.

Variables.Name: bGPUSharedFlag
Variables.Description: Whether to support GPU sharing of the underlying native texture resource.

Variables.Name: bAutoGenerateMips
Variables.Description: Whether to support Mip maps for this render target texture

Variables.Name: OverrideFormat
Variables.Description: Normally the format is derived from RenderTargetFormat, this allows code to set the format explicitly.
